SELECT date_sub(toDate('2023-10-01'), INTERVAL 10 DAY) AS new_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT date_sub(DAY, 30, toDate('2023-01-01')) AS result1, date_sub(MONTH, 2, toDate('2023-03-01')) AS result2 FROM test_dates;
SELECT date_sub(DATE, 1, (SELECT toDate('2023-10-31') FROM test_dates)) AS adjusted_date;
SELECT date_sub(YEAR, 5, (SELECT MIN(event_date) FROM test_dates)) AS historic_date;
SELECT date_sub(SECOND, 120, event_time) AS adjusted_time FROM test_events;
SELECT date_sub(YEAR, 1, (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM test_events)) AS last_year_event_time;
SELECT date_sub(DATE, 365, (SELECT event_time FROM test_events LIMIT 1)) AS one_year_ago;
